articles.title: The unsolved murder of Kendric Price, a beloved youth mentor gunned down on his childhood street in Dorchester
articles.description:
is used to specify article abstract. You can only provide plain text in this element. --> Kendric Price had seemingly done everything right. He grew up on Greenwood Street in Dorchester, graduated from Buckingham Browne & Nichols School in Cambridge, and got a scholarship to the University of Michigan, where he earned his bachelor’s degree in just three years. The 6-foot-9 Price became a financial analyst and started a nonprofit called Big Business […]
